text: I feel the gentle tension of a liminal space, a corridor between utility and creativity. The first image fills me with quiet anticipation—an empty hall, an unspoken potential in every corner. In the second image, vibrant colors and curious displays awaken my mind; the words 'R + D' invite me to ponder the ever-changing relationship between humanity and our mechanisms of progress. I feel both a spectator and a participant in this unfolding dance between order and innovation.
